REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY ALLEGE ANY VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION IN GOOD FAITH BEING MINDFUL OF ALL THE EXHIBITS ATTACHED TO THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT, ALL ALLEGATIONS MADE SO FAR, SHAM PLEADING DOCTRINE AND THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION MUST BE SUPPORTED BY FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS, NOT CONCLUSIONS. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B. FAILURE TO COMPLY IN THE FUTURE WILL RESULT IN MOTIONS BEING TREATED AS UNOPPOSED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to properly allege any viable cause of action in good faith being mindful of all the exhibits attached to the original complaint, all allegations made so far, sham pleading doctrine and the statute of limitations. Each element of each cause of action must be supported by factual allegations, not conclusions.
The court notes that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Failure to comply in the future will result in motions being treated as unopposed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
